title: justicia lucens
intro: Justicia lucens, also known as the shining justicia or golden lantern, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Justicia lucens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Justicia lucens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
